accessible_table.unequal_distance_disclosure: Mall, walking, and PT stages retain their source-supplied unequal distances; equal exposure is not assumed.

alt_text: Four accepted dates are shown as three-stage Mall Skate, Walk, and PT Skate profiles. Metric-specific directions remain mixed and reciprocal CSS rows are omitted from the default view.
interpretation: The repeated protocol shows consistent stage structure with metric-specific PT movement toward Mall, away from Mall, or unchanged; no universal return claim is made.
limitations: Wearables estimate physiologic, autonomic, MSK, movement, impact, and transport burden. They do not directly measure pain. Results are within-person evidence, not clinical proof, diagnosis, causation, universal proof, or legal proof.
long_description: The repeated protocol shows consistent stage structure with metric-specific PT movement toward Mall, away from Mall, or unchanged; no universal return claim is made. CSS connectors show three unique stage pairs; reciprocal and identity rows are audit-only. Return direction is descriptive, not Cohort Similarity Score. Wearables estimate physiologic, autonomic, MSK, movement, impact, and transport burden. They do not directly measure pain. Results are within-person evidence, not clinical proof, diagnosis, causation, universal proof, or legal proof.
qualifications: CSS connectors show three unique stage pairs; reciprocal and identity rows are audit-only.
Return direction is descriptive, not Cohort Similarity Score.
source_labels: Accepted Mall → Walk → PT Skate protocol
title: Repeated Mall → Walk → PT Skate protocol
